svg.text: UML-ish class diagram for src/self and src/core/ast.til
Long horizontal layout by file. Fields are shown close to the original declarations, without default values. No arrows on purpose.
Notes: panels are one file each, in the requested order: modes, lexer, ast, parser, initer, typer, precomp, scavenger, builder, dispatch, interpreter. Methods are omitted. No arrows on purpose.
